# ErrorRegistry.JsonRpcReservedRange property

The JSON-RPC 2.0 reserved range for pre-defined errors: `-32768..-32000` inclusive. Codes outside this range are available for application use (§22.2, §22.7).

```csharp
public static CodeRange JsonRpcReservedRange { get; }
```
